# Khaled Waleed

> Senior Software Engineer based in Baghdad, Iraq. Five years shipping production web apps with SvelteKit, Nuxt, and Go. Currently building at Qi and Vitex.

## About

- Name: Khaled Waleed
- Role: Senior Software Engineer
- Location: Baghdad, Iraq
- Stack: SvelteKit, Nuxt, TypeScript, Go, PostgreSQL, Docker, Linux
- Languages: English, Arabic
- Site: https://khaledwaleed.com
- Contact: contact@khaledwaleed.com

## Key pages

- [Home](https://khaledwaleed.com/): Overview, current work, stack.
- [About](https://khaledwaleed.com/about): Background, experience, skills.
- [Writing](https://khaledwaleed.com/writing): Short, opinionated essays on engineering, hiring, and working from Iraq.
- [Now](https://khaledwaleed.com/now): What I'm working on, building, reading and learning right now.
- [Likes](https://khaledwaleed.com/likes): A short list of tools, books and ideas I recommend.
- [Contact](https://khaledwaleed.com/contact): Email and direct links.

## Writing

- [Hiring senior engineers in Iraq](https://khaledwaleed.com/writing/hiring-senior-engineers-in-iraq): Notes on the Iraqi tech market from inside it.
- [The cost of a slow page](https://khaledwaleed.com/writing/the-cost-of-a-slow-page): Why page speed is a business metric, not a vanity one.
- [Building for the web from Baghdad](https://khaledwaleed.com/writing/building-for-the-web-from-baghdad): Working as a senior engineer from Iraq — tooling, trade-offs, client expectations.
